blocks.content: Daniel held the look for another second — waiting to see if there was anything there. There wasn't. Silence wasn't interesting enough to hold his attention.
He was gone before Larry could decide whether he'd made the right call.
Probably he had. Probably staying quiet was the smart play. Don't make enemies on the first day. Don't make yourself memorable for the wrong reasons.
He told himself that all the way to third period.
